# STULZ

**Category:** Cooling  
**Website:** https://www.stulz.com/

## Headline
Cooling infrastructure specialist relevant to dense and mission-critical compute environments.

## Overview
STULZ is a useful vendor for buyers evaluating precision cooling and facility-level thermal design in mission-critical environments. For AI-related deployments, it belongs in the comparison set when thermal control, uptime, and white-space cooling quality are central concerns.

## Key capabilities
- precision cooling systems
- mission-critical thermal design support
- facility-scale cooling infrastructure

## Best fit for
- mission-critical environments
- operators comparing facility-level cooling strategies
- teams needing a mature thermal infrastructure partner

## Considerations
Should be compared against newer liquid-first approaches when density assumptions are unusually aggressive.
